column4: It’s not a good meal overall. The dish combinations feel odd—for example, chicken with spinach doesn’t work well. The taste is generally poor, and the food is often not served hot. The roti is almost always not fresh. Also, the mess timing is too short; it should be extended from 7–9 PM to 7–10 PM.
column9:
I had found hairs in my meal probably 3-4 times so the hygiene is definitely not their priority. Also the spoon and fork are not well washed, often times the lala in the mess is drying it with a dirty towel. 

The taste is also not good. Almost all the dishes tastes the same. I don’t know why but it is what it is.

The timing is very odd. At least in summer months when Isha is on 8:45 how can the mess be closed on 9. Please extend the timing.

The mess manager is also not a good person. His looks is like scanning you from top to bottom. He should be charged. The freshies feel harassed.
column10:
There should be strict policies about hygiene. The stuff should good with students. Like if we tell them to heat our food in the microwave they should do it happily, not saying that it is hot it doesn’t need to be heated again.

Every month we should get the chance to select the menu. Not same menu fonentire semester
